errors.NOT_VERIFIED: I-akhawunti ayenziwanga isebenze. Nceda uvule i-imeyile yakho kuqala.

errors.ALREADY_VERIFIED: I-akhawunti sele yenziwe yasebenza. Ungangena ngoku.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Ikhonkco liphelelwe lixesha. Nceda ucele ilinki entsha.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Iseshoni iphelelwe lixesha. Nceda ungene kwakhona.
errors.INVALID_CONTROLLER_COUNT: Inani leekhaka kufuneka libe phakathi ko-1 kunye no-4.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Ayikwazanga ukuqhagamshela kwiseva. Qinisekisa ukuba iseva iyasebenza kwaye unoqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Kwenzeke impazamo kwiseva. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.
